channel.title: Plugin update: REST API - Head Tags (version 1.1.2)
channel.description:
Hi everyone :wave:,
We have released some bug fixes for the **REST API - Head Tags** WordPress plugin (1.1.2). More specifically, we have improved the performance when the plugin cache is cleaned and changed the way the admin hooks and the REST API hooks are registered.
### Patch Changes
- [`8159151`](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/commit/81591510a74fc053999e78ea9fd690d50f760bde) [#23](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/pull/23) - Fix the performance of the clear cache functionality.
* [`f15f02a`](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/commit/f15f02a2f0163547ab120b918455df1ff73eb2d7) [#22](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/pull/22) - Fix the way admin hooks and rest api hooks are being registered.
- `admin_init` is used for `register_admin_hooks` - `rest_api_init` is used for `register_rest_hooks`
---
> 💡 To update the plugin to the latest version, use the update button in the WordPress admin panel or download it from [here](https://wordpress.org/plugins/rest-api-head-tags/).

item.title: Plugin update: REST API - Head Tags (version 1.1.2)
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
Hi everyone ,

We have released some bug fixes for the REST API - Head Tags WordPress plugin (1.1.2). More specifically, we have improved the performance when the plugin cache is cleaned and changed the way the admin hooks and the REST API hooks are registered.

Patch Changes

  • 8159151 #23 - Fix the performance of the clear cache functionality.

  • f15f02a #22 - Fix the way admin hooks and rest api hooks are being registered.

    • admin_init is used for register_admin_hooks
    • rest_api_init is used for register_rest_hooks

To update the plugin to the latest version, use the update button in the WordPress admin panel or download it from here.

Read full topic
item.source: Plugin update: REST API - Head Tags (version 1.1.2)
